title: A Friend's Hot Tip
scenario: A friend swears a particular stock will 'double in a month' and urges you to put in ₹30,000 now. Do you jump in?

choices.label: Go all in on the tip
choices.lesson: 'Guaranteed double' tips are a classic trap. Concentrated bets on hype are gambling, not investing — and beginners usually lose.

choices.label: Pass and keep building basics
choices.lesson: Boring beats flashy. Before chasing returns, secure your basics — an emergency fund and diversified, low-cost investing.
